suggestions.title: Clarify whether endpoint is concrete or template
suggestions.review_note: Resolved decision used endpoint template format.
suggestions.action_taken: Updated text to explicitly state TRAPI team confirmed Azure OpenAI base URL format and that resource-specific host is supplied through TRAPI_ENDPOINT.

suggestions.title: Align endpoint formatting across docs
suggestions.review_note: Endpoint examples were inconsistent across files.
suggestions.action_taken: Updated local.settings.json.example to use https://<resource>.openai.azure.com, matching readme.md and spec.md.

suggestions.title: Remove process log artifact from PR
suggestions.review_note: log file contained agent execution notes.
suggestions.action_taken: Reverted log to original content and moved step tracking to agent-activity.log as requested by issue instructions.
